"""通用工具函数"""
import os
from pathlib import Path


def ensure_dir(path: str) -> Path:
    """确保目录存在"""
    p = Path(path)
    p.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    return p

"""处理器测试"""
from {{PACKAGE_NAME}}.core.processor import Processor


def test_processor_init():
    """测试处理器初始化"""
    processor = Processor()
    assert processor.config == {}

[project]
name = "{{PROJECT_SLUG}}"
version = "0.1.0"
description = "{{PROJECT_DESCRIPTION}}"
readme = "README.md"
requires-python = ">=3.10"

[project.scripts]
{{PROJECT_SLUG}} = "{{PACKAGE_NAME}}.cli:app"

[build-system]
requires = ["setuptools>=61.0"]
build-backend = "setuptools.build_meta"

# {{PROJECT_NAME}}

{{PROJECT_DESCRIPTION}}

## 安装

```bash
pip install -e .
```

## 使用

```bash
{{PROJECT_SLUG}} --help
{{PROJECT_SLUG}} run <input_file>
```

## 变现方向

{{MONETIZATION}}

## 差异化

{{DIFFERENTIATION}}
